creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-02-12 03:07:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/qwebirc         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  qwebirc is a fast, easy to use, free and open source IRC client
  designed by and originally just for the QuakeNet IRC network.
  It incorporates SSL and notifications via favicon/titlebar flashing.
  
  WWW:    http://qwebirc.org
  
  PR:             ports/142919
  Submitted by:   Terry (tabmow at freenode.net)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1009    +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/mail/qwebirc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/qwebirc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/mail/qwebirc/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +187 -0    ports/mail/qwebirc/pkg-plist (new)
